summaryForNext: Greenfield: all three goals NOT MET, no code exists. Key inputs for plan: establish OpenSpec capability specs first (openspec/specs empty), verify research-era crate versions before scaffold, decide TUI include/defer and CI placement, and resolve four safety design risks (TOCTOU re-check, symlink no-follow, trash-on-external-volume errors, mtime as min-age basis). Safety-module tests should gate all destructive-path code.
